dataset.title: Scraped Leads Dataset
dataset.description: Full dataset of business leads scraped from Google Maps. Each item contains name, phone, website, address, rating, reviews, and more.

leadsCSV.title: Leads CSV Download
leadsCSV.description: All scraped leads exported as a UTF-8 CSV file, compatible with Excel and Google Sheets.

leadsJSON.title: Leads JSON Download
leadsJSON.description: All scraped leads exported as a structured JSON file.
